privileged_info_summary: The task references two real industrial equipment models: the Haas VF-2SS, a commercial 12,000 RPM CNC vertical mill produced by Haas Automation with 30 HP spindle and 30x16x20 inch travels; and the Schuler 2500T, a real heavy-duty industrial hydraulic press from Schuler Group (German manufacturer, founded 1939) with 2500-ton capacity, 1140 HP rating, and 3760 PSI operating pressure. All other data including equipment names, categories, maintenance schedules (90 days), and request specifications are synthetic records created within the Odoo system for the task execution.
